name: image_ernie_turbo
description: ERNIE-Image-Turbo — DMD/RL-distilled 8B variant of Baidu's ERNIE-Image (Apache-2.0). Same precise text rendering and instruction following as the base model, but 8 euler steps at cfg 1 for ~3-4× faster generation. Reuses ministral-3-3b CLIP + flux2-vae and the ernie-image-prompt-enhancer. ~24 GB VRAM.

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the image to generate. The workflow's built-in ERNIE prompt-enhancer rewrites short prompts before encoding, so terse inputs work well.
